[38;5;59m│[39m         asDexType() *dex.DexType            [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m         asDexField() *dex.DexField          [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m         asDexMethod() *dex.DexMethod        [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/.../specification.go[39m      [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/.../hashing_visitor.go[39m    [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mWriteFile[0m [38;5;103mWriting to r8_go/src/dex/dex_[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m1[39m [38;5;153mpackage[39m dex                              [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m2[39m                                          [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m3[39m [38;5;103m// DexItem is the base interface for all[39m [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m    [38;5;103mitems in a DEX file.[39m                     [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m4[39m [38;5;153mtype[39m DexItem [38;5;153minterface[39m {                 [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m5[39m     [38;5;103m// Add common DexItem methods here[39m   [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m    [38;5;103mas needed.[39m                               [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m6[39m }                                        [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m7[39m                                          [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m8[39m [38;5;103m// DexReference is the base interface[39m    [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m    [38;5;103mfor all cross-references in a DEX file.[39m  [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m  [38;5;103m9[39m [38;5;153mtype[39m DexReference [38;5;153minterface[39m {            [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m10[39m     DexItem                              [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m11[39m     [38;5;153mreferenceTypeOrder[39m() int             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m12[39m     [38;5;153misDexType[39m() bool                     [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m13[39m     [38;5;153misDexField[39m() bool                    [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m14[39m     [38;5;153misDexMethod[39m() bool                   [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m15[39m     [38;5;153masDexType[39m() *DexType                 [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m16[39m     [38;5;153masDexField[39m() *DexField               [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m17[39m     [38;5;153masDexMethod[39m() *DexMethod             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m18[39m }                                        [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mEdit[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/.../specification.go:     wi[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m54[39m      withIntArray(getter [38;5;153mfunc[39m(any)       [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     [][38;5;153mint[39m) StructuralSpecification          [38;5;59m│[39m

[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m56[39m       withShortArray(getter [38;5;153mfunc[39m(any)    [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m      [][38;5;153mint16[39m) StructuralSpecification       [38;5;59m│[39m

[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m58[39m   }                                      [38;5;59m│[39m

 [38;5;183m⠦[39m [3mUntangling neural nets…[0m [38;5;103m(esc to cancel, 2m 5s)[39m

[38;5;103m ? for shortcuts [39m
[38;5;59m───────────────────────────────────────────────────

[30m[48;5;234m▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀
[39m [38;5;217m* [39m프로젝트 코드 분석해봐. 개선포인트를 찾고
   하나씩 진행하자.
   진행률을 점검하고 미진한 부분, 누락된 작업,
   남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은
   것부터 진행해보자.
   clean architecture, single responsibility
   principle, interface-oriented programming
   관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난 부분을
   개선하자.

[30m▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄
[39m[49m /workspace/tmp         [38;5;217mno[39m             [38;5;103m/model [39mAuto
 [38;5;103m(4aa08788a4*)[39m          [38;5;217msandbox[39m        (Gemini 3)
